closure_rationale: All Definition-of-Done items implementable without a benchmark campaign are met by merged PRs 4144, 4202, 4258, 4297, 4352, 4354, 4482, 4593, and 4634. The only remainder is a seed-controlled benchmark campaign, which the issue puts out of scope and which COMPLETE-FIRST treats as complete for CPU-only work.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Anisotropic FoV weight prototyped on the vectorized force evaluation (in-cone full strength, ~0.1 behind heading).
acceptance_evidence.evidence: hsfm_anisotropic_fov_v1 selector: PR 4258 (surface/fixtures), PR 4297 (pairwise isolation + vectorized weight), PR 4352 (per-pair seam consumption), PR 4354 (vectorized O(N^2) loop pinned to PySocialForce). Tests tests/sim/test_hsfm_fov_pairwise_isolation.py.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: HSFM heading state + alignment-torque term decoupling heading from instantaneous velocity.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: Heading state via hsfm_total_force_v1 (PR 4144); damped alignment torque hsfm_alignment_torque_v1 (PR 4634) replaces instant heading snap. Note docs/context/issue_3481_hsfm_alignment_torque.md; tests tests/sim/test_hsfm_alignment_torque_model.py.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Opt-in TTC-scaled predictive repulsion available as an alternative to Euclidean-distance repulsion.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: hsfm_ttc_predictive_v1 selector + bounded pp-TTC repulsion + validated ttc_predictive_force config (PR 4202). Tests tests/sim/test_ttc_predictive_pedestrian_model.py.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Scoping/design note describing the force-law changes and modeling assumptions.
Fixtures for narrow-passage lateral sliding and bottleneck freeze/deadlock across selector variants.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: narrow_passage_lateral_sliding and bottleneck_freeze_deadlock geometric fixtures in robot_sf/benchmark/pedestrian_model_fixture_diagnostics.py with local threshold emission (thresholds_applied=True = local assertions, not benchmark gates). PRs 4482, 4593. Tests tests/benchmark/test_pedestrian_model_fixture_diagnostics.py.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: HSFM/TTC parameters versioned; evidence_tier kept honest.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: Frozen fail-closed config dataclasses wired through SimulationSettings; all notes/reports carry diagnostic/prototype boundary; no calibrated-realism or paper claim promoted.

evidence_trail.contribution: Phase 1 pedestrian_model selector + hsfm_total_force_v1 heading state
hsfm_ttc_predictive_v1 selector + bounded TTC repulsion + config
per-pair FoV force consumption at simulator seam

residual_risks.risk: No seed-controlled benchmark campaign demonstrating reduced lateral sliding / freeze rate at benchmark strength.
residual_risks.why_it_remains: Campaign/Slurm runs are out of scope for this CPU-only closure audit; the issue defers benchmarked comparison and evidence-tier upgrade to a separate claim-promotion task.

residual_risks.risk: Fixture proxies are local diagnostic assertions, not calibrated realism metrics.
residual_risks.why_it_remains: The issue explicitly keeps evidence_tier at idea/diagnostic until durable in-repo benchmark evidence exists; the fixtures intentionally emit descriptive proxies only.
